1.text: BYZ and TR include from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ .

16.text: Or at last the wrath (of God) has come upon them.

6.text: Or although as apostles of Christ we could have been a burden to you ; SBL, NE, and WH include this phrase with verse 7.

7.text: WH and NA we were like young children among you

2.text: Or our brother and God’s fellow worker ; NE, WH, BYZ, and TR our brother and minister of God

13.text: Literally those who have fallen asleep , as in verses 14 and 15

4.text: Literally know how to possess his own vessel

6.text: Or no one should ever harm or cheat his brother in this matter

23.text: Or may your spirit, soul, and body be kept entirely blameless
